title: Basic Optimizer
description: basic modpack to edit for yourself only with already installed optimization mods
body:
# Modpack Contents 
 Sodium - the same optifine only for fabric, but better (more details: https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) 
 Sodium Extra - an add-on for Sodium adding the ability to better configure Sodium (more details: https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) 
 Lithium - optimizes mob AI and physics (more details: https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) 
 Dynamic FPS - when minecraft is in the background the fps will drop to 1 fps (more details: https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) 
 iris shaders - are not shaders, but the ability to install shaders for optifine only on fabric (more details: https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) 
 these were the main mods in the modpack, about the rest you can find out [search > name of the mod in the modpack > mod] All mods in the modpack were installed in the Modrinth App or on modrinth.com, not one of the mods was installed through third-party sites
## Purpose of the modpack
The modpack contains basic optimization mods that are in each of your modpacks, this modpack is needed to change it for yourself only with already installed optimization mods, I do not forbid you to add more optimization mods to this modpack, I posted the modpack on modrinth. you can use it as you want and change it
### Recommendations
If you want better results, install other assemblies for optimization, for example Fabulously Optimized (https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) Simply Optimized (https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)
These are just my recommendations, I do not force you to install these modpacks
